nasb.text: His sons used to go and hold a feast in the house of each one on his day, and they would send and invite their three sisters to eat and drink with them.

esv.text: His sons used to go and hold a feast in the house of each one on his day, and they would send and invite their three sisters to eat and drink with them.

cnv.text: 他的兒子素常輪流各按自己的日子在家擺設筵席，並且打發人去邀請他們的三個姊妹來一同吃喝。

ccb.text: 约伯的儿子们经常轮流在自己家里设宴，派人邀请他们的三个姊妹来一起吃喝。
